name: task-worklist-panel
title: Task Worklist Panel
description: A task / order worklist as a panel — STAT/urgent and incomplete work sort to the top. Composes WidgetPanel + ClinicalTaskRow.

props.name: items
props.description: Tasks; each is a ClinicalTaskRow's props (+ optional id). Include onCompletedChange to make rows checkable.

props.name: prioritize
props.description: Sort STAT → urgent → routine, incomplete before complete.

clinicalNotes: A worklist's value is triage order: this panel floats incomplete + highest-priority tasks to the top so nothing urgent is buried, while completed tasks sink but remain visible and auditable during a shift. Keep the row's completion controlled by your own state (onCompletedChange) so completion persists to the source of truth, not just the UI.
notes: Layer-M2 panel. Client component. Feeds the Provider dashboard block (B-2).
